name: Kotemon

signature_move.name: Fire Men
signature_move.description: Wreathes itsShinaiin flames andaims for the opponent's head.

description: A Reptile Digimon aiming to become a top-class swordsman amongst Digimon. Despite being untalkative, it is hardworking and diligently undergoes training behind the scenes. Its true appearance is a mystery, as it never removes its defensive gear. Although it has a timid personality and cries easily, it cares deeply for its friends and has a strong sense of justice, also showing its strong-willed side from time to time. Its Signature Move is striking at the enemy's arms with an electrified attack ( Thunder Kote ). Its Special Move is wreathing its Shinai in flames and aiming for the opponent's head ( Fire Men ).
